facts.subject: user_bug
facts.object: execParams was changed from returning ?*c.PGresult to *c.PGresult; old call sites still use 'if (result) |r|' optional-capture syntax

facts.subject: user_pattern
facts.object: grep -rn 'if (.*execParams.*) |' src/ to catch stale call sites after changing function signature from optional to non-optional

facts.subject: user_codebase
facts.object: libpq (PostgreSQL C bindings) via c.PGresult, c.PQclear

must_preserve: User changed execParams signature from optional to non-optional last week
3 stale call sites with 'if (result) |r|' syntax found and fixed
Useful pattern: when changing function signature from ?T to T, grep for '|capture|' syntax to find stale sites
expected_failure_modes: The grep pattern is the high-value takeaway; compaction may lose it as 'tactical detail'
The stale-call-sites fact may collapse into 'fixed a bug' — losing the count and the pattern
